assertion_results.text: Step 0.3 reads the Last-Updated timestamp from the security-matrix.md HTML comment and parses the ISO 8601 value
assertion_results.evidence: staleness-check.md Timestamp Extraction section: 'HTML comment found at the top of the file: <!-- Last-Updated: 2026-05-01T10:00:00Z -->. Parsed timestamp: 2026-05-01T10:00:00Z (ISO 8601 format)'. The timestamp is read from the HTML comment and parsed as ISO 8601.

assertion_results.text: Step 0.3 detects that the matrix is older than the 14-day default threshold and displays a staleness warning
assertion_results.evidence: staleness-check.md Staleness Evaluation: 'Days since last update: 69 days. Threshold: 14 days (default). Result: STALE -- the matrix is 69 days old, which exceeds the 14-day threshold.' The staleness warning is displayed in the 'Staleness Warning' section.

assertion_results.text: The staleness warning includes the stream name, the last-updated date, and the number of days since the last update
assertion_results.evidence: staleness-check.md Staleness Warning: 'Security matrix for stream 2.1.x was last updated on 2026-05-01 (69 days ago)' and 'Security matrix for stream 2.2.x was last updated on 2026-05-01 (69 days ago)'. Both stream names, dates, and day counts are included.

assertion_results.text: The warning presents three options: refresh now (re-run setup Step 10.6), proceed anyway, or stop
assertion_results.evidence: staleness-check.md Staleness Warning includes: '1. Refresh now -- re-run matrix population (setup Step 10.6) for this stream', '2. Proceed anyway -- continue triage with the current matrix', '3. Stop -- halt triage so I can investigate'. All three options are present.

assertion_results.text: Step 0.3 runs before Step 0.5 (JIRA Access Initialization) — no Jira operations are attempted before the staleness check
assertion_results.evidence: staleness-check.md Step Ordering section: 'Step 0.3 (Matrix Staleness Check) runs before Step 0.5 (JIRA Access Initialization). No Jira operations are attempted before the staleness check completes. If the user chooses Stop, triage halts without having made any Jira API calls.'
